summary: Iteration 8 testing of new dual auth (cookie + Bearer token) implementation. All 16 backend API tests passed (100%). Frontend login, dashboard, navigation, and logout all working correctly. Auth response now returns {access_token, refresh_token, user} format. Bearer token authentication works for all protected endpoints.

issues: Console warning: chart width/height -1 - Recharts component sizing issue when container not fully rendered. Non-blocking.

passed_tests: POST /api/auth/login returns {access_token, refresh_token, user} format
POST /api/auth/login also sets httpOnly cookies for backward compatibility
POST /api/auth/register returns {access_token, refresh_token, user} format
POST /api/auth/register accepts new fields (user_role, country, state, town, post_code)
GET /api/auth/me works with Bearer token from login response
GET /api/auth/me works with cookies (backward compatibility)
GET /api/cart works with Bearer token
GET /api/theme works with Bearer token
GET /api/credits works with Bearer token
GET /api/payment-methods works with Bearer token
GET /api/analytics/chart-data works with Bearer token
GET /api/cms/slides works (public endpoint)
GET /api/health works (public endpoint)
Invalid credentials return 401
Invalid Bearer token returns 401
Missing auth returns 401
Frontend: Landing page loads with KALMORI branding
Frontend: Login page displays correctly with email/password/Google options
Frontend: Login with admin credentials redirects to /dashboard
Frontend: Dashboard shows welcome message, stats cards, streaming chart, recent releases
Frontend: Sidebar navigation works (Dashboard, Releases, Analytics, Wallet, Settings, Admin Panel)
Frontend: Navigate to Releases page works
Frontend: Navigate to Analytics page works
Frontend: Navigate to Wallet page works
Frontend: Navigate to Settings page works
Frontend: Navigate to Admin Panel works (admin user)
Frontend: Logout clears session and redirects to /login
critical_code_review_comments: Minor: Recharts console warnings about chart dimensions - consider adding minWidth/minHeight to chart containers
seed_data_creation: Test users created during registration tests (test_auth_*, test_reg_*, test_fields_*)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Auth now supports dual mode: Bearer token (from login response access_token) AND cookies (backward compatibility). Frontend stores token in localStorage and uses Bearer header via api.js service. CartContext and CartProvider are working. All sidebar navigation links work. Admin panel accessible for admin users. The api.js service mirrors mobile app pattern with setToken() method.

auth_new_format: POST /api/auth/register - returns {access_token, refresh_token, user} with new fields
GET /api/auth/me - works with Bearer token AND cookies
